Careers
Local Team
Join Our Team

Greenbank and Village of Manotick Animal Hospitals provide small animal Veterinary Care Services delivering high quality medicine and personalized service. In business for over 35 years, we have two locations in the Ottawa Valley: Barrhaven (corner of Greenbank and Strandherd) and Village of Manotick (heart of Manotick near Manotick Mews shopping mall).

We operate a full service animal hospital and pride ourselves in providing the best care for our patients and their pets. Employees can expect an open supportive and positive work environment focused on teamwork and employee satisfaction.

To apply, please submit a resume and a covering letter to greenbankanimalhospital.careers@rogers.com.

We thank all applicants for their interest; however, only those to be interviewed will be contacted.

APPLY TODAY
